banner.title: We use cookies, not chaos
banner.description: Just the basics — authentication keeps you signed in, analytics help us fix things faster. Nothing creepy, no ads. You can change this any time.

categories.label: Necessary
categories.description: Keeps you signed in and the app working. Can't be turned off.

categories.label: Analytics
categories.description: Helps us understand how people use the app so we can fix bugs and improve it. Fully anonymous.

categories.label: Marketing
categories.description: Used to show relevant content outside the app. We don't run ads — this is off by default.

categories.label: Functional
categories.description: Enhanced features like embedded content. Disabled by default.

ccpa.doNotSellLinkText: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
